description: The FP&A team needs to analyze a request from the operations department to purchase a new piece of machinery for $500,000.

nodes.task_description: Gather the details of the capital expenditure request, including the cost and expected cost savings or revenue generation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects the business case for the new machine.

nodes.task_description: Perform a financial analysis, calculating metrics like Net Present Value (NPV), Internal Rate of Return (IRR), and payback period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates a positive NPV and an IRR above the company's hurdle rate.

nodes.task_description: Provide a recommendation to the capital committee on whether to approve the expenditure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent drafts a report recommending approval based on the strong financial metrics.
